meaning: n.[妞峕鎬荤姸鍗囬夯,绫诲彾鍗囬夯(鏈夋瘨,鍙緵鍖荤敤),钃濈苯绫诲彾鐗′腹
examples: In very rare cases, black cohosh has been associated with liver failure.
It is the first study to evaluate the cognitive effects of black cohosh.
It's disappointing that we didn't find black cohosh to be an effective remedy.
Skip supplements like black cohosh, which do not seem to offer any added benefit to diet and exercise.
And it added in one case, a woman using black cohosh needed a liver transplantation after a particularly severe reaction.
